schema.description: Explains a specific decision result for an entity at a given timestamp. Supports both boolean and categorical decision outputs.
schema.x-ts-note: Naming alignment: DecisionResult uses 'value' for the decision output; DecisionExplanation uses 'decision' for the same concept. SDK should map both consistently: decision.value (DecisionResult) and explanation.decision (DecisionExplanation) represent the same Decision (At). Do not rename either — keep SDK field names as decision.value and explanation.decision to match their respective schema fields.

decision.description: boolean for threshold/percentile/change/z_score/composite strategies. string label for equals strategy on categorical input.

concept_value.description: The raw concept output that was evaluated

threshold_applied.description: Present for threshold, percentile, change, z_score strategies. Null for equals and composite strategies.

label_matched.description: Present for equals strategy only. The label that was matched (or null if no match).

drivers.description: Input signals and their contribution to the concept value

schema.title: DecisionExplanation

type.description: Machine-readable error type. Always branch on this field — never on message. TypeScript SDK maps this directly to MemintelError.type.

404.description: Decision record not found for given entity + timestamp

type.description: Machine-readable error type. Always branch on this field — never on message. TypeScript SDK maps this directly to MemintelError.type.
